title: Integrate ProjectUpdater into CommandCenterUI
description: Operator asked to integrate ProjectUpdater and CommandCenterUI. Add a small CommandCenterUI integration surface that shows ProjectUpdater status from the local ProjectUpdater app/storage files where possible, provides an Open ProjectUpdater action, and documents the boundary between the static ProjectUpdater localStorage app and the localhost CommandCenterUI backend. Avoid backend/network expansion beyond localhost and keep ProjectUpdater data ownership clear.
acceptance_criteria: CommandCenterUI exposes a ProjectUpdater panel or sidebar section that can open the ProjectUpdater app from the local project path
The backend exposes a read-only ProjectUpdater integration/status endpoint without reading browser localStorage directly or adding non-localhost dependencies
The UI makes the data boundary clear: ProjectUpdater remains localStorage-owned; CommandCenterUI can launch or summarize integration status only unless an explicit import/export path exists
Validation covers server syntax/API behavior and existing MAP task graph/events checks
